generated_oml:
instance IncubatorInternalTempSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal temperature of incubator"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IncubatorTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance IncubatorInternalTempSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal temperature of incubator"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IncubatorTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance ExternalTempSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring external ambient temperature"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IncubatorTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance IncubatorTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IncubatorInternalTempSensor1, IncubatorInternalTempSensor2, ExternalTempSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IncubatorTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler
]

instance ThermalModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with two parameters: C_air and G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance ThermalModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with four parameters: C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance ScipyCalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library for non-linear least squares parameter calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for running thermal simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance OneWireBusEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire bus protocol for sensor data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance ControlOptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for bang-bang control optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlOptimizationService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation models for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Non-linear least squares calibration of thermal model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterCalibrationInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of system safety by comparing predicted vs actual temperatures"
    DTDFVocab:provides AnomalyDetectionInsight
]

instance ControlOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control optimization for temperature regulation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterOptimizationAction
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values used for optimizing control parameters"
]

instance ParameterCalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated thermal model parameters from non-linear least squares optimization"
]

instance AnomalyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Anomaly detection by comparing predicted vs actual temperatures"
]

instance ControlParameterOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimization of bang-bang control parameters H and C"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains InsulatedContainer, Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPiController, PCBControlCircuit, PowerSupply, IncubatorInternalTempSensor1, IncubatorInternalTempSensor2, ExternalTempSensor
]

instance InsulatedContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "214×214×3 mm heatbed controlled via MOSFETs for 4A current"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan for airflow control"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller"
]

instance PCBControlCircuit : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for actuator control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for thermal incubator system"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for heatbed and fan generated by DT and transmitted via RabbitMQ to low-level driver, which triggers MOSFET-based actuation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated via RabbitMQ where physical components (sensors, actuators) communicate with DT models and algorithms through message-based interaction; DT includes simulation models, calibration algorithms, and monitoring services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates during the 'as operated' phase of the physical incubator's lifecycle, continuously monitoring and controlling the system post-deployment."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model B has higher fidelity due to accounting for heatbed thermal inertia; validation via experimental comparison of predicted vs measured temperatures; uniformity assumption tested with multiple sensors showing discrepancies up to 7°C (reduced to 6°C with higher fan voltage)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker protocol for data exchange between PT (sensors, actuators) and DT components; data transmitted via RabbitMQ queues."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "DT hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B with RabbitMQ server running locally; low-level driver and controller implemented on the same device."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver implements a safe protocol to prevent unsafe actuation; no details on cybersecurity measures or remote operation safety are provided in the document."
]
